title: Saint Cecilia's Church of England School ransomware incident

victim.name: Saint Cecilia's Church of England School

extortion.description: Saint Cecilia’s is a vibrant Church of England secondary school with a distinctive Christian ethos for pupils aged 11-18 years. The school first opened in September 2003 on the site of Wandsworth Boys School. It currently has close to 1,000 pupils on roll, including approximately 200 students in its thriving Sixth Form.
